channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Even more items to deal with, 25th May
item.description:
Black Metal polls dumped outside 22 Evergreen Square. Had enough!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Milnan, 25th May
item.description:
Filthy litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milman Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Even more rubbish, 25th May
item.description:
Black bin liners dumped outside park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Plastic boxes, toys, cardboard and various other crap tipped all over the floor outside park. Gets worse over bank holifays

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping all over pavement, 25th May
item.description:
This has been ongoing for years and there is zero enforcement against the residents in adjacent building who treat the pavement outside the building as their open air rubbish facility

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulky item removal, 25th May
item.description:
Someone left this on the pavement. Is it please possible to send someone over to collect this bulky item? Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 25th May
item.description:
Bags of rubbish left

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish and stuffed dumped, 25th May
item.description:
Lots of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge cuttings need clearings from ground, 25th May
item.description:
Someone has cleared the hedge on the side but dumped it all on the path. This needs to be swept away and thrown away, not just dumped back on the flower bed as the wind will blow it away

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has dumped a large part of a car, 25th May
item.description:
Someone had dumped a large part of a car on the pavement of blackfen road blocking the entrance to the road Hawthorn terrace. It is a hazard for people passing and children passing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawthorn Terrace, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped laughing gas can, 25th May
item.description:
Rubbish and serious trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes and rubbish dumped, 25th May
item.description:
Clothes and rubbish dumped on ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Road Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shrub too high, overgrown, can't see house, 25th May
item.description:
The shrubs need to be properly maintained, no point send them to trim the side if the top is too high to even see the path before getting to it, well over 7 ft tall, at night can be scary. This should be properly maintained, put ina complaint already but they only did the sides but not the top. waste of my time and yours,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frant Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Morrisons trolley, 25th May
item.description:
It’s been dumped and needs to be removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Dead baby fox, 25th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bike frame, 25th May
item.description:
Bike has been attached to this post for months. Now being stripped down
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashenden Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Dumped canisters, 25th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, The Crescent, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Ducklings, 25th May
item.description:
Can you put signs up around the lake to stop chasing and frightening the ducklings . Kids especially, 1 duckling today got separated from its mother because of this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
